fault_hypothesis: The expiration check on line 64 uses `>` instead of `>=`, incorrectly treating entries as valid when `now` exactly equals the adjusted expiration time.

constraints.intent: An entry at its exact expiration time should be considered stale, not fresh.
If an entry is returned, it must not have reached its adjusted expiration time.
The adjusted expiry time must be greater than or equal to the original expiry time.

spec.expr: (key not in entries) or (__cbfl_result is None) or (now < entries[key][1])

constraints.intent: A returned cache entry must exist and be strictly unexpired (ignoring clock skew).
